metadata.description: Manual labels for 10 selected registry problems

two_sum.statement_summary: Given an array of integers nums and an integer target, return indices of the two numbers such that they add up to target

palindrome_number.statement_summary: Given an integer x, return true if x reads the same forward and backward, and false otherwise

remove_duplicates.statement_summary: Given a sorted integer array nums, remove the duplicates in-place such that each unique element appears only once

three_sum.statement_summary: Given an integer array nums, return all unique triplets [nums[i], nums[j], nums[k]] such that i != j != k and nums[i] + nums[j] + nums[k] == 0

longest_palindrome.statement_summary: Given a string s, return the longest palindromic substring in s

letter_combinations.statement_summary: Given a string containing digits from 2 to 9 inclusive, return all possible letter combinations that the number could represent

coin_change.statement_summary: Given coin denominations and a target amount, return the minimum number of coins needed to make up that amount

solve_n_queens.statement_summary: Given an integer n, return all distinct solutions to the n-queens puzzle where queens are placed on an n×n board with no two attacking each other

regular_expression_matching.statement_summary: Given an input string s and a pattern p, implement regular expression matching with support for '.' and '*'

euler_3.statement_summary: Return the largest prime factor of n
